title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Yamato, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Kaido as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Aaaa A!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MOMONO- SURE, YOUR SURVIVIVIVIVIVIAL IS THE TOP PRIORITY NOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to get you on a ship and off this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: AHi?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None of the beast pirate's ships are here!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: (Rumble

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Not even the sea is here..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Wha-?! what do you mean?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WE'RE TOO LATE!! WE'VE LOST OUR CHANCE OF ESCAPING BY SEA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BUT, I NOW REALIZE... WHAT THESE TREMORS ARE!! Mangas

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Yamato!! What on earth is happening?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dragons... they can generate flame clouds which enable them to fly. That means, right now...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaido is lifting Onigashima itself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's planning to move the island to the flower capital!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Are you satisfied now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...with this, the Kozuki are finished!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Wano Kuni" or rather, "new Oniga- Shima"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: will become a strong- hold for pirates...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Let's begin!! A world of mayhem!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 21 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
